ogTitle: Lochington vs Lockhart River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lochington and Lockhart River.
heading: Lochington vs Lockhart River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lochington, Queensland and Lockhart River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lochington has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Lockhart River (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lochington or Lockhart River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lochington has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Lockhart River scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lochington scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Lockhart River scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lochington or Lockhart River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lochington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
